step.question: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?

payload.analysis_goal: find visitors who visited museums opened before 2009 and after 2011
assumptions: Only synced local schema metadata is trusted.

raw_plan.intent: find visitors who visited museums opened before 2009 and after 2011

payload.sql: SELECT v.Name FROM visitor AS v WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis1 JOIN museum AS m1 ON vis1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID WHERE vis1.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m1.Open_Year < '2009') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis2 JOIN museum AS m2 ON vis2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID WHERE vis2.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m2.Open_Year > '2011') LIMIT 100

output.sql: SELECT v.Name FROM visitor AS v WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis1 JOIN museum AS m1 ON vis1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID WHERE vis1.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m1.Open_Year < '[REDACTED_LITERAL]') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis2 JOIN museum AS m2 ON vis2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID WHERE vis2.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m2.Open_Year > '[REDACTED_LITERAL]') LIMIT 100
output.raw_sql:
SELECT v.Name
FROM visitor AS v
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM visit AS vis1
    JOIN museum AS m1 ON vis1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID
    WHERE vis1.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m1.Open_Year < '[REDACTED_LITERAL]'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM visit AS vis2
    JOIN museum AS m2 ON vis2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID
    WHERE vis2.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m2.Open_Year > '[REDACTED_LITERAL]'
)
LIMIT 100

input.question: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?
What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?

output.analysis_goal: find visitors who visited museums opened before 2009 and after 2011
assumptions: Only synced local schema metadata is trusted.

raw_plan.intent: find visitors who visited museums opened before 2009 and after 2011

input.question: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?
input.plan_goal: find visitors who visited museums opened before 2009 and after 2011

output.sql: SELECT v.Name FROM visitor AS v WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis1 JOIN museum AS m1 ON vis1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID WHERE vis1.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m1.Open_Year < '2009') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM visit AS vis2 JOIN museum AS m2 ON vis2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID WHERE vis2.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m2.Open_Year > '2011') LIMIT 100
output.raw_sql:
SELECT v.Name
FROM visitor AS v
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM visit AS vis1
    JOIN museum AS m1 ON vis1.Museum_ID = m1.Museum_ID
    WHERE vis1.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m1.Open_Year < '2009'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM visit AS vis2
    JOIN museum AS m2 ON vis2.Museum_ID = m2.Museum_ID
    WHERE vis2.visitor_ID = v.ID AND m2.Open_Year > '2011'
)
LIMIT 100
